question: What is the company policy on remote work?
gold_answer: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week with manager approval.
gold_context_snippet: may work remotely up to three days per week

question: How many days of paid vacation does a new full-time employee receive?
gold_answer: New full-time employees receive 20 days of paid vacation per year.
gold_context_snippet: 20 days of paid vacation per year

question: Who should I contact to report a security incident?
gold_answer: Security incidents must be reported immediately to the Security Operations Center (SOC) via security@example.com.
